clinicalLogbooks.title: Clinical Logbook
clinicalLogbooks.subtitle: Record and manage your clinical activities during the rotation.
clinicalLogbooks.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your clinical activity in detail...
clinicalLogbooks.competencyTargetPlaceholder: Link to a rotation competency target...
clinicalLogbooks.competencyTargetHint: Verified entries with a linked competency count toward your competency progress.
clinicalLogbooks.emptyDesc: Start recording your clinical activities by clicking the “Add Entry” button above.
clinicalLogbooks.errFileFormat: File format must be JPG, PNG, or PDF.
clinicalLogbooks.errRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
clinicalLogbooks.errDescMax: Description must be at most 2000 characters.
clinicalLogbooks.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this entry?

clinicalVerification.title: Logbook Verification
clinicalVerification.subtitle: Review and verify logbook entries submitted by students.
clinicalVerification.emptyPendingSub: All logbooks have been processed. Check back later for new entries.
clinicalVerification.emptyProcessedSub: Entries will appear here once processed.
clinicalVerification.batchDialogDesc: All selected logbooks will be verified on your behalf. Entries outside your hospital scope are automatically skipped and reported.
clinicalVerification.batchFeedbackPlaceholder: Example: Activity is appropriate and well documented.
clinicalVerification.verifyDesc: You are about to approve the logbook of {name}. Add feedback notes if needed.
clinicalVerification.rejectDesc: You are about to reject the logbook of {name}. A rejection reason is required so the student knows what needs to be fixed.

clinicalAttendance.title: Attendance
clinicalAttendance.subtitle: Record your attendance at the hospital with location verification (GPS).
clinicalAttendance.noRotationDesc: You are not scheduled for any rotation today.
clinicalAttendance.radiusHint: Make sure you are within the hospital area (Radius {radius}m). The system will verify your device's GPS coordinates.
clinicalAttendance.reasonPlaceholder: Example: High fever, doctor's note to follow.
clinicalAttendance.leaveHint: Your request will be flagged for review by the supervisor/admin in the attendance recap.
clinicalAttendance.errGeoUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by this browser.
clinicalAttendance.errGeoFailed: Failed to get location. Make sure location (GPS) permission is enabled.
clinicalAttendance.distanceError: You are {distance} meters from the hospital. The maximum distance is {radius} meters.

clinicalAttendanceRecap.title: Attendance Recap
clinicalAttendanceRecap.subtitle: A summary of student attendance including GPS distance from the hospital and anomaly flags (unusual location changes / suspected proxy check-in) for review.
clinicalAttendanceRecap.correctionNotesPlaceholder: Example: Doctor's note verified as valid.
clinicalAttendanceRecap.correctionHint: A correction resolves the flag and is recorded on your behalf.
clinicalAttendanceRecap.errForbidden: You do not have permission for the attendance recap.
clinicalAttendanceRecap.errLoad: Failed to load the attendance recap.

clinicalCompetencyProgress.title: Competency Progress
clinicalCompetencyProgress.subtitle: Competency targets per rotation vs. actual achievement from verified logbooks.
clinicalCompetencyProgress.selectStudentPrompt: Select a student to view their competency progress.
clinicalCompetencyProgress.noTargets: There are no competency targets for the rotations taken yet.
clinicalCompetencyProgress.noTargetsHint: Admins can add targets in the Master Competency menu (select rotation + minimum cases).

clinicalSkills.title: Skill Checklist
clinicalSkills.subtitleStudent: Your clinical skill observation progress per rotation — assessed by your supervisor.
clinicalSkills.subtitleAssessor: Clinical skill observation of students per rotation (latest level applies).
clinicalSkills.emptyStudent: The rotations you are taking do not have a skill checklist yet.
clinicalSkills.emptyAssessor: Select a student to view/fill in their skill checklist.

clinicalEvaluations.title: Evaluation Questionnaire
clinicalEvaluations.noRotationDesc: You are not scheduled for any rotation today.
clinicalEvaluations.doneDesc: You have completed the evaluation questionnaire for the rotation at {hospital}. Thank you for helping maintain the quality of clinical education.
clinicalEvaluations.subtitle: Share your feedback to improve the quality of clinical education. This evaluation is anonymous to the preceptor.
clinicalEvaluations.noQuestions: No evaluation questions have been configured yet.
clinicalEvaluations.errRatingRequired: Please provide a rating (1-5) for all questions.

clinicalEvaluationReport.title: Clinical Evaluation Report
clinicalEvaluationReport.subtitle: Anonymous summary of student ratings of preceptors and hospitals.
clinicalEvaluationReport.noData: No evaluation data meets the anonymity threshold ({count} respondents) yet.
